name: Pork Schnitzel
recipeIngredient: 6 boneless top pork loin chops, each 1/2 inch thick
Trimmed of excess fat and sinew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork chops between two sheets of waxed paper.
2. Pound each chop to an even 1/8-inch thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
3. Sprinkle both sides with salt.
4. Measure flour and bread crumbs onto separate sheets of waxed paper.
5. Whisk together egg and milk in a bowl.
6. Lightly coat one side of each cutlet in flour, shaking off excess.
7. Dip the coated side into the egg mixture, then press into bread crumbs to coat evenly.
8. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Working in batches, add the coated cutlets to the skillet.
10. Cook, turning once, until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.
11. Remove the cutlets and serve immediately.
